articles.title: Your agent did not learn from the correction you gave it. The lesson lives in your memory, not its weights -- you are the only thing that remembers.
articles.summary:
You correct an agent. It acknowledges, fixes the output, moves on. You file it as: the agent learned.

It did not. Next session, fresh context, it makes the same mistake -- because the correction neve...
